series_metadata.series_title: Apportioned and Non Apportioned Company/Organizational Logo Plates
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all company / organizational logo applications, petition packets, and artwork from company and organization representatives. This series will also include applicable statistical reports, sample plates, the coordinating action memo containing the plate/logo approval, documents and communications received during the new, revision, and reinstatement plate process.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for twenty-five (25) years from date of application. Records may be transferred to ODPS Record Center. ; Electronic: Correspondence received via email shall be printed. Digital artwork received via email or other electronic medium shall be saved and retained electronically on the office network. Retain for twenty-five years from date of application. Retain original emails in Microsoft Outlook for one year after digital files are saved and correspondence is printed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
